microsoft_ft: Owned end-to-end **product roadmap** for Azure's resilience validation platform, defining requirements and self-service scheduling that standardized 45+ annual drills and drove **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led 0→1 build of an internal **Resilience Automation Platform**, translating complex operational requirements into elegant workflows that reduced toil by 30% and shifted execution to a fully self-service model.

Shipped Azure's first proactive rack-level drill program in **4 months**, achieving a 94% recovery rate by partnering closely with engineering and design to move from concept to production at startup speed.

Directed 14 high-visibility cross-org recovery executions, including bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, tracking accuracy and time-to-close as primary success metrics.

Built an internal **AI agent** for drill planning and restructured workflows, cutting planning cycle time by 39% and increasing drill capacity by 21% — directly expanding the team's ability to serve more customers.
microsoft_2023: Drove **product adoption** for AI-powered code generation workflows by running customer demos and training across 14 Azure service teams, saving 37 engineering hours monthly and validating usage as the core adoption metric.

Shaped the **product roadmap** by conducting 11+ user interviews with finance and engineering stakeholders to surface critical feature gaps, directly influencing prioritization of intent-based YAML generation.

Improved data retrieval accuracy by migrating documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, cutting lookup time by 83% and improving workflow efficiency for internal teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams — translating complex dependencies into a clear, actionable roadmap.

Defined a product strategy to eliminate manual toil during region launches, conducting discovery with 20+ service teams to identify **81 hours of manual effort** per region and building the roadmap to automate critical billing and provisioning paths.

Built a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize the highest-impact workflows — a direct input to quarterly roadmap planning.
amazon_robotics: Defined the **migration strategy** for a 2,000+ unit OS transition, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations and achieving zero operational downtime — balancing technical depth with a bias toward fast, clean execution.

Prioritized a backlog of 40+ high-severity tickets by facilitating Agile sprint planning and retrospectives, stabilizing the **developer intake process** and unblocking cross-functional engineering and operations teams.

Partnered with IT, Operations, and Engineering to ship **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a scalable release model for future product iterations.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning the end-to-end invoicing and proposal lifecycle for 200+ monthly quotes, introducing a new CRM workflow that cut billing cycle time and improved close rates.

Executed a **go-to-market strategy** optimizing digital channels and Google presence, reducing Customer Acquisition Cost by 13% and lifting conversions by 2.7% — partnering with leadership on pricing and positioning.

Identified and closed **margin leaks** by conducting profitability analysis across 1,000+ project records, delivering financial reporting that directly improved leadership pricing models and revenue recognition accuracy.
